predicate_mappings.assigned_reviewer: {} is the assigned reviewer for the consent case {}
predicate_mappings.has_reviewer_assigned: the consent case {} has a reviewer assigned
predicate_mappings.initial_verification_completed: the initial verification for consent case {} is completed
predicate_mappings.signatures_verified: the signatures for consent case {} are verified
predicate_mappings.assigned_attending: {} is assigned to the consent case {}
predicate_mappings.assigned_legal_reviewer: {} is assigned as the legal reviewer for the consent case {}
predicate_mappings.assigned_clinical_specialist: {} is assigned as the clinical specialist for the consent case {}
predicate_mappings.assigned_patient_representative: {} is assigned as the patient representative for the consent case {}
predicate_mappings.applied_validation_method: {} is the validation method applied to the consent case {}
predicate_mappings.validation_result_recorded: the validation result for the consent case {} is recorded
predicate_mappings.committee_approval_recorded: the committee approval for the consent case {} is recorded
predicate_mappings.approval_authority_request_pending: the approval authority request for the consent case {} is pending
predicate_mappings.escalation_required: escalation is required for the case {}
predicate_mappings.finalization_ready: the case {} is ready for finalization
predicate_mappings.default_approval_authority_for_case: the default approval authority for the case {} is {}
predicate_mappings.approval_authority_approval_recorded: the approval authority approval for the case {} is recorded by {}
predicate_mappings.intake_recorded: the intake for the case {} is recorded
predicate_mappings.reviewer_eligible: the clinical reviewer {} is eligible for the consent case {}
predicate_mappings.validation_method_applicable: the validation method {} is applicable to the consent case {}
predicate_mappings.attending_applicable_to_case: the attending physician {} is applicable to the consent case {}
predicate_mappings.legal_reviewer_applicable: the legal reviewer {} is applicable to the consent case {}
predicate_mappings.clinical_specialist_applicable: the clinical specialist {} is applicable to the consent case {}
predicate_mappings.supporting_document_applicable: the supporting document {} is applicable to the consent case {}
predicate_mappings.patient_representative_applicable: the patient representative {} is applicable to the consent case {}
predicate_mappings.governance_channel_applicable: the governance channel {} is applicable to the consent case {}
predicate_mappings.approval_authority_linked_to_case: the approval authority {} is linked to the consent case {}
predicate_mappings.bound_document_source: {} is bound to the document source {}

preconditions: I can only open a consent case A if it is not the case that the consent case A is open and it is not the case that the case A is finalized
effects: Once I open a consent case A, it is the case that the consent case A is open

assign_clinical_reviewer.description: assign a clinical reviewer B to a consent case A
preconditions: I can only assign a clinical reviewer B to a consent case A if it is the case that the consent case A is open and the reviewer B is available and the clinical reviewer B is eligible for the consent case A
I can only assign a clinical reviewer B to a consent case A if it is not the case that the consent case A has a reviewer assigned
effects: Once I assign a clinical reviewer B to a consent case A, it is the case that B is the assigned reviewer for the consent case A and the consent case A has a reviewer assigned
Once I assign a clinical reviewer B to a consent case A, it is not the case anymore that the reviewer B is available

release_clinical_reviewer.description: release a clinical reviewer B from a consent case A
preconditions: I can only release a clinical reviewer B from a consent case A if it is the case that B is the assigned reviewer for the consent case A

I can only release a clinical reviewer B from a consent case A if it is not the case that the validation result for the consent case A is recorded and it is not the case that the committee approval for the consent case A is recorded
effects: Once I release a clinical reviewer B from a consent case A, it is the case that the reviewer B is available

Once I release a clinical reviewer B from a consent case A, it is not the case anymore that B is the assigned reviewer for the consent case A and it is not the case anymore that the consent case A has a reviewer assigned and it is not the case anymore that the initial verification for consent case A is completed and it is not the case anymore that the signatures for consent case A are verified and it is not the case anymore that escalation is required for the case A and it is not the case anymore that the case A is ready for finalization and it is not the case anymore that A requires additional review

bind_document_source.description: bind a document source B to a consent case A
preconditions: I can only bind a document source B to a consent case A if it is the case that the consent case A is open and the document source B is available
effects: Once I bind a document source B to a consent case A, it is the case that A is bound to the document source B
Once I bind a document source B to a consent case A, it is not the case anymore that the document source B is available

unbind_document_source.description: unbind a document source B from a consent case A
preconditions: I can only unbind a document source B from a consent case A if it is the case that A is bound to the document source B
effects: Once I unbind a document source B from a consent case A, it is the case that the document source B is available
Once I unbind a document source B from a consent case A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the document source B

complete_initial_verification_from_sourc.description: complete initial verification for a consent case A using a document source B
preconditions: I can only complete initial verification for a consent case A using a document source B if it is the case that the consent case A is open and the consent case A has a reviewer assigned and A is bound to the document source B
I can only complete initial verification for a consent case A using a document source B if it is not the case that the initial verification for consent case A is completed
effects: Once I complete initial verification for a consent case A using a document source B, it is the case that the initial verification for consent case A is completed

record_external_witness_verification.description: record external witness verification for a consent case A with an external witness B
preconditions: I can only record external witness verification for a consent case A with an external witness B if it is the case that the consent case A is open and the consent case A has a reviewer assigned and the external witness B is available
I can only record external witness verification for a consent case A with an external witness B if it is not the case that the initial verification for consent case A is completed
effects: Once I record external witness verification for a consent case A with an external witness B, it is the case that the initial verification for consent case A is completed and escalation is required for the case A
Once I record external witness verification for a consent case A with an external witness B, it is not the case anymore that the external witness B is available

clerk_verify_signatures.description: clerk verify signatures for a consent case A from a document source B by a clinical clerk C
preconditions: I can only clerk verify signatures for a consent case A from a document source B by a clinical clerk C if it is the case that the initial verification for consent case A is completed and the consent case A has a reviewer assigned and A is bound to the document source B and the clinical clerk C is available
I can only clerk verify signatures for a consent case A from a document source B by a clinical clerk C if it is not the case that the signatures for consent case A are verified
effects: Once I clerk verify signatures for a consent case A from a document source B by a clinical clerk C, it is the case that the signatures for consent case A are verified
Once I clerk verify signatures for a consent case A from a document source B by a clinical clerk C, it is not the case anymore that escalation is required for the case A

clerk_verify_signatures_with_authority.description: clerk verify signatures for a consent case A with approval from an approval authority B
preconditions: I can only clerk verify signatures for a consent case A with approval from an approval authority B if it is the case that the consent case A has a reviewer assigned and the approval authority approval for the case A is recorded by B
I can only clerk verify signatures for a consent case A with approval from an approval authority B if it is not the case that the signatures for consent case A are verified
effects: Once I clerk verify signatures for a consent case A with approval from an approval authority B, it is the case that the signatures for consent case A are verified
Once I clerk verify signatures for a consent case A with approval from an approval authority B, it is not the case anymore that escalation is required for the case A

assign_attending.description: assign an attending physician B to a consent case A
preconditions: I can only assign an attending physician B to a consent case A if it is the case that the consent case A is open and the attending physician B is available and the attending physician B is applicable to the consent case A
effects: Once I assign an attending physician B to a consent case A, it is the case that B is assigned to the consent case A
Once I assign an attending physician B to a consent case A, it is not the case anymore that the attending physician B is available

release_attending.description: release an attending physician B from a consent case A
preconditions: I can only release an attending physician B from a consent case A if it is the case that B is assigned to the consent case A
effects: Once I release an attending physician B from a consent case A, it is the case that the attending physician B is available
Once I release an attending physician B from a consent case A, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned to the consent case A

assign_legal_reviewer.description: assign a legal reviewer B to a consent case A
preconditions: I can only assign a legal reviewer B to a consent case A if it is the case that the consent case A is open and the legal reviewer B is available and the legal reviewer B is applicable to the consent case A
effects: Once I assign a legal reviewer B to a consent case A, it is the case that B is assigned as the legal reviewer for the consent case A
Once I assign a legal reviewer B to a consent case A, it is not the case anymore that the legal reviewer B is available

release_legal_reviewer.description: release a legal reviewer B from a consent case A
preconditions: I can only release a legal reviewer B from a consent case A if it is the case that B is assigned as the legal reviewer for the consent case A
effects: Once I release a legal reviewer B from a consent case A, it is the case that the legal reviewer B is available
Once I release a legal reviewer B from a consent case A, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned as the legal reviewer for the consent case A

assign_clinical_specialist.description: assign a clinical specialist B to a consent case A
preconditions: I can only assign a clinical specialist B to a consent case A if it is the case that the consent case A is open and the clinical specialist B is available and the clinical specialist B is applicable to the consent case A
effects: Once I assign a clinical specialist B to a consent case A, it is the case that B is assigned as the clinical specialist for the consent case A
Once I assign a clinical specialist B to a consent case A, it is not the case anymore that the clinical specialist B is available

release_clinical_specialist.description: release a clinical specialist B from a consent case A
preconditions: I can only release a clinical specialist B from a consent case A if it is the case that B is assigned as the clinical specialist for the consent case A
effects: Once I release a clinical specialist B from a consent case A, it is the case that the clinical specialist B is available
Once I release a clinical specialist B from a consent case A, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned as the clinical specialist for the consent case A

assign_patient_representative.description: assign a patient representative B to a consent case A
preconditions: I can only assign a patient representative B to a consent case A if it is the case that the consent case A is open and the patient representative B is available and the patient representative B is applicable to the consent case A
effects: Once I assign a patient representative B to a consent case A, it is the case that B is assigned as the patient representative for the consent case A
Once I assign a patient representative B to a consent case A, it is not the case anymore that the patient representative B is available

release_patient_representative.description: release a patient representative B from a consent case A
preconditions: I can only release a patient representative B from a consent case A if it is the case that B is assigned as the patient representative for the consent case A
effects: Once I release a patient representative B from a consent case A, it is the case that the patient representative B is available
Once I release a patient representative B from a consent case A, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned as the patient representative for the consent case A

execute_validation_method_clinical_path.description: execute a validation method B on a consent case A with an attending physician C and a legal reviewer D
preconditions: I can only execute a validation method B on a consent case A with an attending physician C and a legal reviewer D if it is the case that the consent case A has a reviewer assigned and C is assigned to the consent case A and D is assigned as the legal reviewer for the consent case A and the validation method B is available and the validation method B is applicable to the consent case A
I can only execute a validation method B on a consent case A with an attending physician C and a legal reviewer D if it is not the case that the validation result for the consent case A is recorded
effects: Once I execute a validation method B on a consent case A with an attending physician C and a legal reviewer D, it is the case that B is the validation method applied to the consent case A and the validation result for the consent case A is recorded
Once I execute a validation method B on a consent case A with an attending physician C and a legal reviewer D, it is not the case anymore that the validation method B is available

execute_validation_method_specialist_pat.description: execute a validation method B on a consent case A with a clinical specialist C using a supporting document D
preconditions: I can only execute a validation method B on a consent case A with a clinical specialist C using a supporting document D if it is the case that the consent case A has a reviewer assigned and C is assigned as the clinical specialist for the consent case A and the supporting document D is available and the validation method B is available and the validation method B is applicable to the consent case A and the supporting document D is applicable to the consent case A

I can only execute a validation method B on a consent case A with a clinical specialist C using a supporting document D if it is not the case that the validation result for the consent case A is recorded
effects: Once I execute a validation method B on a consent case A with a clinical specialist C using a supporting document D, it is the case that B is the validation method applied to the consent case A and the validation result for the consent case A is recorded and A requires additional review and escalation is required for the case A

Once I execute a validation method B on a consent case A with a clinical specialist C using a supporting document D, it is not the case anymore that the validation method B is available and it is not the case anymore that the supporting document D is available

consolidate_validation_results.description: consolidate validation results for a consent case A with an attending physician B and a legal reviewer C
preconditions: I can only consolidate validation results for a consent case A with an attending physician B and a legal reviewer C if it is the case that the validation result for the consent case A is recorded and A requires additional review and B is assigned to the consent case A and C is assigned as the legal reviewer for the consent case A
effects: Once I consolidate validation results for a consent case A with an attending physician B and a legal reviewer C, it is not the case anymore that A requires additional review and it is not the case anymore that escalation is required for the case A

submit_to_ethics_committee.description: submit a consent case A to an ethics committee channel D with an attending physician B and a legal reviewer C
preconditions: I can only submit a consent case A to an ethics committee channel D with an attending physician B and a legal reviewer C if it is the case that the signatures for consent case A are verified and the validation result for the consent case A is recorded and B is assigned to the consent case A and C is assigned as the legal reviewer for the consent case A and the governance channel D is applicable to the consent case A

I can only submit a consent case A to an ethics committee channel D with an attending physician B and a legal reviewer C if it is not the case that escalation is required for the case A and it is not the case that the committee approval for the consent case A is recorded
effects: Once I submit a consent case A to an ethics committee channel D with an attending physician B and a legal reviewer C, it is the case that the committee approval for the consent case A is recorded

submit_to_risk_committee.description: submit a consent case A to a risk committee channel D with a clinical specialist B and a patient representative C
preconditions: I can only submit a consent case A to a risk committee channel D with a clinical specialist B and a patient representative C if it is the case that the signatures for consent case A are verified and the validation result for the consent case A is recorded and B is assigned as the clinical specialist for the consent case A and C is assigned as the patient representative for the consent case A and the governance channel D is applicable to the consent case A

I can only submit a consent case A to a risk committee channel D with a clinical specialist B and a patient representative C if it is not the case that the committee approval for the consent case A is recorded
effects: Once I submit a consent case A to a risk committee channel D with a clinical specialist B and a patient representative C, it is the case that the committee approval for the consent case A is recorded and escalation is required for the case A

record_committee_approval_and_prepare_fi.description: record committee approval for a consent case A and prepare for finalization with an attending physician B and a legal reviewer C
preconditions: I can only record committee approval for a consent case A and prepare for finalization with an attending physician B and a legal reviewer C if it is the case that the committee approval for the consent case A is recorded and escalation is required for the case A and B is assigned to the consent case A and C is assigned as the legal reviewer for the consent case A
effects: Once I record committee approval for a consent case A and prepare for finalization with an attending physician B and a legal reviewer C, it is the case that the case A is ready for finalization

Once I record committee approval for a consent case A and prepare for finalization with an attending physician B and a legal reviewer C, it is not the case anymore that escalation is required for the case A and it is not the case anymore that the signatures for consent case A are verified and it is not the case anymore that A requires additional review

perform_clerk_reverification.description: perform clerk reverification for a consent case A using a document source B with a clinical clerk C
preconditions: I can only perform clerk reverification for a consent case A using a document source B with a clinical clerk C if it is the case that the case A is ready for finalization and the committee approval for the consent case A is recorded and the consent case A has a reviewer assigned and A is bound to the document source B and the clinical clerk C is available
I can only perform clerk reverification for a consent case A using a document source B with a clinical clerk C if it is not the case that the signatures for consent case A are verified
effects: Once I perform clerk reverification for a consent case A using a document source B with a clinical clerk C, it is the case that the signatures for consent case A are verified

mark_authority_request_pending_from_sour.description: mark authority request pending for a consent case A from a document source B
preconditions: I can only mark authority request pending for a consent case A from a document source B if it is the case that the committee approval for the consent case A is recorded and the signatures for consent case A are verified and A is bound to the document source B

I can only mark authority request pending for a consent case A from a document source B if it is not the case that escalation is required for the case A and it is not the case that the approval authority request for the consent case A is pending
effects: Once I mark authority request pending for a consent case A from a document source B, it is the case that the approval authority request for the consent case A is pending

request_witness_verification.description: request witness verification for a consent case A from an external witness B
preconditions: I can only request witness verification for a consent case A from an external witness B if it is the case that the committee approval for the consent case A is recorded and the signatures for consent case A are verified and the external witness B is available

I can only request witness verification for a consent case A from an external witness B if it is not the case that escalation is required for the case A and it is not the case that the approval authority request for the consent case A is pending
effects: Once I request witness verification for a consent case A from an external witness B, it is the case that the approval authority request for the consent case A is pending
Once I request witness verification for a consent case A from an external witness B, it is not the case anymore that the external witness B is available

link_approval_authority_to_case.description: link an approval authority B to a consent case A
preconditions: I can only link an approval authority B to a consent case A if it is the case that the approval authority request for the consent case A is pending and the approval authority B is available and B is applicable for A
effects: Once I link an approval authority B to a consent case A, it is the case that the approval authority B is linked to the consent case A
Once I link an approval authority B to a consent case A, it is not the case anymore that the approval authority B is available

propagate_authority_approval.description: propagate approval from an approval authority C for an outpatient consent case A linked to an inpatient consent case B
preconditions: I can only propagate approval from an approval authority C for an outpatient consent case A linked to an inpatient consent case B if it is the case that the consent case A is open and A is an outpatient case and the default approval authority for the case A is C and the approval authority C is linked to the consent case B

I can only propagate approval from an approval authority C for an outpatient consent case A linked to an inpatient consent case B if it is not the case that the approval authority approval for the case A is recorded by C
effects: Once I propagate approval from an approval authority C for an outpatient consent case A linked to an inpatient consent case B, it is the case that the approval authority approval for the case A is recorded by C

record_intake_completion.description: record intake completion for a consent case A using a document source B by a clinical clerk C
preconditions: I can only record intake completion for a consent case A using a document source B by a clinical clerk C if it is the case that the consent case A is open and A is an outpatient case and the signatures for consent case A are verified and the approval authority request for the consent case A is pending and A is bound to the document source B and the clinical clerk C is available
I can only record intake completion for a consent case A using a document source B by a clinical clerk C if it is not the case that the intake for the case A is recorded
effects: Once I record intake completion for a consent case A using a document source B by a clinical clerk C, it is the case that the intake for the case A is recorded

finalize_inpatient_case.description: finalize an inpatient consent case A
preconditions: I can only finalize an inpatient consent case A if it is the case that A is an inpatient case and the consent case A is open and the consent case A has a reviewer assigned and the validation result for the consent case A is recorded and the committee approval for the consent case A is recorded and the approval authority request for the consent case A is pending and the signatures for consent case A are verified
I can only finalize an inpatient consent case A if it is not the case that the case A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize an inpatient consent case A, it is the case that the case A is finalized

finalize_case_with_authority.description: finalize an outpatient consent case A with an approval authority B
preconditions: I can only finalize an outpatient consent case A with an approval authority B if it is the case that A is an outpatient case and the consent case A is open and the consent case A has a reviewer assigned and the validation result for the consent case A is recorded and the committee approval for the consent case A is recorded and the approval authority request for the consent case A is pending and the signatures for consent case A are verified and the approval authority approval for the case A is recorded by B
I can only finalize an outpatient consent case A with an approval authority B if it is not the case that the case A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize an outpatient consent case A with an approval authority B, it is the case that the case A is finalized

finalize_case_with_intake_record.description: finalize an outpatient consent case A with intake record
preconditions: I can only finalize an outpatient consent case A with intake record if it is the case that A is an outpatient case and the consent case A is open and the consent case A has a reviewer assigned and the validation result for the consent case A is recorded and the committee approval for the consent case A is recorded and the approval authority request for the consent case A is pending and the signatures for consent case A are verified and the intake for the case A is recorded
I can only finalize an outpatient consent case A with intake record if it is not the case that the case A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize an outpatient consent case A with intake record, it is the case that the case A is finalized

action_nl_templates.assign_clinical_reviewer: assign clinical reviewer {?clinical_reviewer} to consent case {?consent_case}
action_nl_templates.release_clinical_reviewer: release clinical reviewer {?clinical_reviewer} from consent case {?consent_case}
action_nl_templates.bind_document_source: bind document source {?document_source} to consent case {?consent_case}
action_nl_templates.unbind_document_source: unbind document source {?document_source} from consent case {?consent_case}
action_nl_templates.complete_initial_verification_from_sourc: complete initial verification for consent case {?consent_case} using document source {?document_source}
action_nl_templates.record_external_witness_verification: record external witness verification for consent case {?consent_case} with external witness {?external_witness}
action_nl_templates.clerk_verify_signatures: clerk verify signatures for consent case {?consent_case} from document source {?document_source} by clinical clerk {?clinical_clerk}
action_nl_templates.clerk_verify_signatures_with_authority: clerk verify signatures for consent case {?consent_case} with approval from approval authority {?approval_authority}

action_nl_templates.release_attending: release attending physician {?attending_physician} from consent case {?consent_case}
action_nl_templates.assign_legal_reviewer: assign legal reviewer {?legal_reviewer} to consent case {?consent_case}
action_nl_templates.release_legal_reviewer: release legal reviewer {?legal_reviewer} from consent case {?consent_case}
action_nl_templates.assign_clinical_specialist: assign clinical specialist {?clinical_specialist} to consent case {?consent_case}
action_nl_templates.release_clinical_specialist: release clinical specialist {?clinical_specialist} from consent case {?consent_case}
action_nl_templates.assign_patient_representative: assign patient representative {?patient_representative} to consent case {?consent_case}
action_nl_templates.release_patient_representative: release patient representative {?patient_representative} from consent case {?consent_case}
action_nl_templates.execute_validation_method_clinical_path: execute validation method {?validation_method} on consent case {?consent_case} with attending physician {?attending_physician} and legal reviewer {?legal_reviewer}
action_nl_templates.execute_validation_method_specialist_pat: execute validation method {?validation_method} on consent case {?consent_case} with clinical specialist {?clinical_specialist} using supporting document {?supporting_document}
action_nl_templates.consolidate_validation_results: consolidate validation results for consent case {?consent_case} with attending physician {?attending_physician} and legal reviewer {?legal_reviewer}
action_nl_templates.submit_to_ethics_committee: submit consent case {?consent_case} to ethics committee channel {?ethics_committee_channel} with attending physician {?attending_physician} and legal reviewer {?legal_reviewer}
action_nl_templates.submit_to_risk_committee: submit consent case {?consent_case} to risk committee channel {?risk_committee_channel} with clinical specialist {?clinical_specialist} and patient representative {?patient_representative}
action_nl_templates.record_committee_approval_and_prepare_fi: record committee approval for consent case {?consent_case} and prepare for finalization with attending physician {?attending_physician} and legal reviewer {?legal_reviewer}
action_nl_templates.perform_clerk_reverification: perform clerk reverification for consent case {?consent_case} using document source {?document_source} with clinical clerk {?clinical_clerk}
action_nl_templates.mark_authority_request_pending_from_sour: mark authority request pending for consent case {?consent_case} from document source {?document_source}
action_nl_templates.request_witness_verification: request witness verification for consent case {?consent_case} from external witness {?external_witness}
action_nl_templates.link_approval_authority_to_case: link approval authority {?approval_authority} to consent case {?consent_case}
action_nl_templates.propagate_authority_approval: propagate approval from approval authority {?approval_authority} for outpatient consent case {?outpatient_consent_case} linked to inpatient consent case {?inpatient_consent_case}
action_nl_templates.record_intake_completion: record intake completion for consent case {?consent_case} using document source {?document_source} by clinical clerk {?clinical_clerk}
action_nl_templates.finalize_case_with_authority: finalize outpatient consent case {?consent_case} with approval authority {?approval_authority}
action_nl_templates.finalize_case_with_intake_record: finalize outpatient consent case {?consent_case} with intake record

predicate_nl_templates.committee_approval_recorded: the committee approval for the consent case {?consent_case} is recorded

predicate_nl_templates.finalization_ready: the case {?consent_case} is ready for finalization

predicate_nl_templates.patient_representative_applicable: the patient representative {?patient_representative} is applicable to the consent case {?consent_case}
predicate_nl_templates.governance_channel_applicable: the governance channel {?governance_channel} is applicable to the consent case {?consent_case}
predicate_nl_templates.approval_authority_linked_to_case: the approval authority {?approval_authority} is linked to the consent case {?consent_case}
predicate_nl_templates.bound_document_source: {?consent_case} is bound to the document source {?document_source}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a consent case or a clinical reviewer or a validation method or a legal reviewer or a attending physician or a clinical specialist or a document source or a external witness or a approval authority or a clinical clerk or a supporting document or a patient representative or a governance channel is also a object
Everything that is a ethics committee channel or a risk committee channel is also a governance channel
Everything that is a inpatient consent case or a outpatient consent case is also a consent case
